Why VerdeVissuals

Built for athletes. Trusted by families.

From the sidelines to the boardroom, every shoot is handled with the same care — so you get back to what matters and we handle the rest.

01

Professional Editing

Every image is color-graded and retouched to a broadcast-quality standard before it ever reaches your gallery.

02

Fast Delivery

Edited galleries are delivered quickly after the event — no waiting weeks to see your photos.

03

High-Quality Images

Shot on professional gear at full resolution, ready to print, frame, or share across every platform.

04

Player-Focused Coverage

Every athlete on the roster gets dedicated attention — not just the highlight-reel moments.

05

Affordable Pricing

Premium-level photography at prices built for real families and teams.

06

Family-Owned & Local

Run by a young South Florida photographer who knows the leagues, the venues, and the people.

How It Works

From kickoff to gallery link.

01

Choose Your Package

Pick the package that fits your event and your budget — Starter, Standard, or Premium.

02

Send Event Details

Share your player's number, game info, and event date to lock in coverage.

03

On-Site Coverage

VerdeVissuals is on the sideline capturing the action, the saves, and the celebrations.

04

Receive Your Gallery

Get your edited photos through a private online gallery link, ready to view and download.

About Diego

A young photographer with an eye for every angle.

Diego Verde started VerdeVissuals out of a simple love for sports and a camera he taught himself to use on the sidelines of his own games.

What began as a way to capture moments for friends and teammates has grown into a photography business serving youth athletes, teams, and tournaments across South Florida — with a focus on soccer, player portraits, and individual sessions.

Just like a bird taking in the whole field from above, VerdeVissuals captures every angle of the action — the saves, the celebrations, the sideline moments, and the quiet in-between shots that tell the full story. Every shoot is approached with the same goal: to preserve memories that last.
